sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ سَوِيًّا وَأَكَلَتْ آخِرَ وَجْبَةٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je zajedno sjela i pojela posljednji obrok u danu.
sentences.translationEn: The family sat together and ate the last meal of the day.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّعَامُ بَسِيطًا: شُوربَةٌ وَخُبْزٌ وَزَيْتُونٌ.
sentences.translation: Hrana je bila jednostavna: supa, hljeb i masline.
sentences.translationEn: The food was simple: soup, bread, and olives.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَبُ: الطَّعَامُ الْبَسِيطُ هُوَ أَفْضَلُ طَعَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Otac je rekao: Jednostavna hrana je najbolja hrana.
sentences.translationEn: The father said: Simple food is the best food.

sentences.arabic: رَدَّ الْجَمِيعُ بِالْمُوَافَقَةِ وَانْتَهَتِ الْوَجْبَةُ بِسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi su se složili i obrok je završio sretno.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone agreed and the meal ended happily.
